title: 2. **meOS Affiliate Marketing**
summary:
What it is: Promote meOS iOS app through affiliate marketing channels, such as social media, blogs, or specialized tech forums. Leverage Clawmpson's autonomous capabilities to create engaging promotional content.
Revenue model: Earn commissions for each successful meOS app referral or sale generated through unique affiliate links.
Time to first dollar: 1-3 weeks.
